summary: Comprehensive testing of new entity details endpoints (teacher/course/department/faculty full-profile / full-details / summary) and Global Search route updates. Backend: 18/18 pytest cases pass (success/404/400 for all 4 endpoints, search-route assertions, mobile-app regression). Frontend: Login works; all 4 detail pages render correctly with headers, stat cards and data; inter-page navigation works (course->teacher, dept->teacher, dept->course, faculty->dept); Global Search modal opens, returns courses/departments/lectures and clicking a course result correctly lands on /course-details (NOT /course-lectures).

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' triggered on modal open/typing in GlobalSearch.tsx. Not blocking but should be cleaned up (likely a stray whitespace between RN <View> children).
Header title text appears clipped/cut on the right (e.g. 'تفاصيل الم...'). Title container needs more horizontal space or shorter label.

action_items: (Optional polish) Fix 'Unexpected text node' RN warning inside GlobalSearch.tsx by removing stray whitespace/strings between <View> children.
(Optional polish) Increase header title width or shorten label in detail pages so 'تفاصيل المعلم/المقرر/القسم/الكلية' is not truncated.
critical_code_review_comments: entity_details.py: All four endpoints correctly use ObjectId try/except for 400 and explicit 404 — good.

entity_details.py: students_count is derived from len(students) but only counts students whose _id is in `students` collection with is_active: True. Enrollments that reference deleted/inactive students are silently dropped. Acceptable but worth documenting.

entity_details.py: present/absent attendance counts use 2 separate count_documents per student inside a loop (N+1 query). For large classes (e.g. 72 students) this is fine but could be optimized via aggregation if it grows.
global_search.py line 335: lecture results still route to /course-lectures?courseId=... — this is correct per spec (lectures are a different entity) but main agent should confirm.
server.py line 13525: entity_details_router properly registered with /api prefix.
Frontend course-details.tsx: `tab-${label}` testID uses dynamic label (e.g. 'الطلاب (72)'). Recommend using stable testID like `tab-students` to ease automated tests.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production IDs (course=698f0000d803b27aab0120af, teacher=698ad3da31ab437a06176e2a, dept=698e500997fef774e66e93a8, faculty=698e4f9297fef774e66e93a4)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_entity_details.py covers all 4 new endpoints + search route updates + mobile regression. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_entity_details.py -v`. Login is via username on /login, button text 'تسجيل الدخول'. Global Search modal trigger is the 'بحث سريع' input on dashboard; results are grouped by category in JSON response.results.{courses,teachers,departments,faculties,lectures,students}.
rca of the issue: N/A - no failing flow detected. All requested functionality verified.
